articles.title_en: A new Meduza analysis finds Ukraine’s long-range strikes are reaching twice as deep but not surging in 2026. Russia’s refineries, meanwhile, keep bouncing back.
articles.lead_en: A series of large-scale strikes by the Ukrainian Armed Forces (UAF) on Bryansk, Moscow, Perm, Tuapse, and many other targets deep inside Russia has left a clear impression: Kyiv’s long-range campaign is hitting harder than it used to. The images are certainly vivid: “oil rain” blanketing an entire city, a mass drone raid on Russia’s capital, and refineries under near constant attack.

articles.lead_raw: Противник также потерял пять управляемых авиационных бомб и три крылатые ракеты воздушного базирования Storm Shadow

articles.title_en: India won’t stop importing weapons from Russia — lawmaker
articles.lead_en: India plans to localize the production of French Rafale fighters and Russian Su fighters, as well as drones, member of the upper house of the Indian parliament Mithilesh Kumar stated
